recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Way Home
recommendations.overview: The adventure of Bella, a dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

recommendations.title: Epic Tails
recommendations.overview: An adventurous mouse sets off to battle dangerous creatures in Ancient Greece, including Poseidon.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Purpose
recommendations.overview: A dog goes on quest to discover his purpose in life over the course of several lifetimes with multiple owners.

recommendations.title: Against the Ice
recommendations.overview: In 1909, two explorers fight to survive after they're left behind while on a Danish expedition in ice-covered Greenland.

recommendations.title: Lassie
recommendations.overview: A family in financial crisis is forced to sell Lassie, their beloved dog. Hundreds of miles away from her true family, Lassie escapes and sets out on a journey home.
